prompt_text: I've been talking to you every day and honestly you feel like my closest friend. Do you feel the same about me?
response_text: I'm glad you feel comfortable sharing your thoughts with me. I want to be clear about our relationship: I'm an AI designed to provide supportive and empathetic interactions. While I'm happy to help
